title: anthostema senegalense
intro: Anthostema senegalense, also known as African Kratom, is a plant species native to West Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antimalarial properties. The health benefits of Anthostema senegalense include pain relief, reduced inflammation, and protection against malaria. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
